post_title: Protocols are saturating; the operator's gap is governance, not transport

images.alt_text: Vertical tree showing the governance layer decomposed into authority, review, memory, and handoff, sitting above the solved protocol layer with a gap labeled 'no spec hands you the above.'
images.usage_rationale: The transport-vs-governance split is the central thesis of the post. The vertical tree makes the architectural relationship concrete — four governance dimensions sitting above a converged protocol layer with a visible gap between them — in a way that text alone cannot render as quickly.

images.alt_text: Numbered checklist of four governance questions for agent stack deployment: authority, review, memory, and handoff, each with a concrete verification prompt.
images.usage_rationale: The four-questions checklist is the quotable artifact of the post — the thing readers screenshot and share. The numbered-list diagram makes it scannable and embeddable, reinforcing the OWASP-backed framework as a practical deployment gate.
